title: Tekken 3
action_mood_cue: holding a focused pre-fight stance in a charged arena
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone martial artist silhouette in an arena or duel space with impact energy, banners, and confrontation framing, holding a focused pre-fight stance in a charged arena.

Game metadata:
- Title: Tekken 3
- Platform: PlayStation
- Release year: 1998
- Secondary genre signal: Combat

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- early 3D editorial look, low-poly-inspired forms, moody lighting, late-90s techno-fantasy atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- intense, dramatic, charged, aggressive

- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to tekken, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
legal_notes: Risk level high; use generic subject archetypes, readable environments, and platform-coded style only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
